items.title: The Great Wealth Transfer is real — but the IRS or a nursing home might get your money first

items.title: High gas prices soak up more retail-sales dollars — and restaurants are paying the bill

items.title: Berlin court rules Google's AI Overviews are just a new search format, not original content

items.title: SpaceX bets $60 billion on Cursor to catch OpenAI and Anthropic
